scan.title: Scan receipts in seconds
scan.body: Snap a photo at the register. Pockeet keeps everything on your device until you are ready to sync.

organize.title: AI organizes the details
organize.body: Merchants, totals, and line items are filled in for you so review is quick—not tedious.

clarity.title: See the month at a glance
clarity.body: Track spending by category and know what still needs a quick check before it is final.

onboarding.authSubtitle: Sign in to sync across devices later. Or start locally—your receipts stay on this phone.
onboarding.guestHint: Receipts stay on this device. Sign in later to sync across devices.
onboarding.comingSoonBody: {{provider}} sign-in is not available in this build yet. Use Continue as guest for now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences and about
settings.currencyHint: Home totals include only receipts in this currency. Other currencies show a note on Home.

foundation.title: UI foundations
foundation.subtitle: Design system primitives — not product screens.

addReceipt.title: Add receipt
addReceipt.subtitle: Scan, import, or upload — saved on this device instantly.
addReceipt.takePhotoBody: Use your camera to capture a paper receipt
addReceipt.chooseGalleryBody: Import one or more photos from your library
addReceipt.uploadPdfBody: Browse files for a digital receipt PDF

capture.permissionBody: Pockeet uses your camera to scan receipts. You can also pick photos from your gallery.
capture.discardBody: Your photos will be removed from this session.
capture.maxPagesBody: You can add up to {{max}} photos per receipt.
capture.lastPageBody: A receipt needs at least one photo.
capture.savedLocallyHint: Saved on this device. Review details after analysis.
capture.galleryDeniedBody: Allow photo library access in Settings to import receipt images.
capture.pdfSessionBody: You already have photos in this session. Continue to preview or cancel before uploading a PDF.
capture.pdfReplaceBody: Uploading a PDF will discard the photos in this session.
capture.pdfFailedBody: Please choose a PDF file and try again.
capture.editPageHint: Opens crop editor for this page
capture.cropHint: Pinch to zoom and drag to position the receipt inside the frame.
capture.cropMissingImage: This page is no longer in the session.

processing.title: Analyzing receipt
processing.completeBody: We filled in merchant, date, and line items. Check them before saving.

review.title: Review receipt
review.subtitle: Check the details below. Adjust anything that looks off.
review.subtitleParsed: We pulled these details from your receipt. Tap anything to fix it.
review.subtitleManual: Add the receipt details manually. You can finish this later.
review.errorTotal: Enter a total greater than zero
review.errorLineItems: Complete or clear partial line items
review.lineItemsWarningBody: Line items don't add up to the receipt total. You can still save if it looks right.

home.subtitle: Your month, gently organized
home.monthTotalHint: Totals appear after receipts are analyzed.
home.otherCurrencyFootnote: {{count}} receipt(s) in other currencies not included in this total
home.emptyBody: Scan a receipt to see spending totals and categories fill in automatically.

receipts.subtitle: Everything you've saved on this device
receipts.emptyBody: Scan a receipt to build your history on this device.
receipts.filteredEmptyBody: Try adjusting your filters or clear them to see all receipts.

filters.title: Filters
filters.sheetHint: Narrow your list by month, category, or status. Changes apply instantly.

ask.title: Ask Pockeet
ask.subtitle: Questions about your spending
ask.emptyTitle: What would you like to know?
ask.emptyHint: Ask about categories, merchants, or how much you've spent this month.
ask.disclaimer: Answers are estimates based on saved receipts. Not financial advice.

suggested.restaurants: How much on restaurants this month?

receiptDetail.title: Receipt
receiptDetail.stillAnalyzingBody: Merchant, date, and total will appear after parsing.
receiptDetail.noImages: No photos saved for this receipt.
receiptDetail.pdfAttachmentHint: Saved on this device. Page preview is not available for PDFs yet.
receiptDetail.deleteBody: This removes the receipt from your device.
receiptDetail.notFound: This receipt may have been deleted or is no longer available.

demo.banner: Dev only — load sample receipts for demos.
demo.alreadySeededBody: Clear demo data first to reload samples.
demo.resetBody: Only sample receipts tagged as demo will be removed.
demo.resetOnboardingBody: Clears onboarding and sign-in state. The app will restart the welcome flow.
